creator: amzo1337@gmail.com
text:
I'm busy working on a tensorflow port 2.9.1 and it compiles as it should, but requires the latest keras versions to operate correctly.

The entire keras stack needs to be upgraded to have a functional tensorflow port.


Tensorflow requires keras-preprocessing versions >= 1.1.1. While the port version currently remains at 1.1.0

I'll not currently attach a patch as nothing much needs changing to the port except the version.
